work_unit: AC-F005 fix: auto-commit.py is_excluded 扩展敏感文件后缀/文件名排除
situation: audit-2026-07-03-010 finding AC-F005 (MED): EXCLUDED_PREFIXES 不覆盖 .env/*.pem/*.key 等敏感文件。AC-F002 filtered-stage fix 已在 case-396 修过，但 is_excluded 本身仍只检查前缀，不检查后缀/文件名——若未来代码回归 git add -A 或 stage_paths 构造有 bug，敏感文件仍可泄露。纵深防御要求 is_excluded 自身也拦截敏感模式。
action: 在 autonomous-studio/.claude/hooks/auto-commit.py 增加 SENSITIVE_SUFFIXES (.env/.pem/.key/.p12/.pfx/.jks/.keystore/.secret/.secrets/.credentials/.token/.aws/.npmrc/.pypirc/.dockercfg) 和 SENSITIVE_BASENAMES (.env/.env.local/id_rsa/id_dsa/id_ecdsa/id_ed25519/google-services.json/credentials.json/service-account.json/client_secret.json/.htpasswd/shadow/passwd) 两个常量；is_excluded() 在原有前缀检查后追加后缀+文件名匹配。同步修改 live 部署版 /home/admin/workspace/.claude/hooks/auto-commit.py。
outcome_evidence: python3 -m py_compile 通过；opt-worktree.sh commit 成功创建 opt-hooks-1783018753 并 push 到 origin/auto/opt-hooks-1783018753；diff 确认新增 SENSITIVE_SUFFIXES(14项)+SENSITIVE_BASENAMES(14项)+is_excluded 扩展逻辑
next_suggestion: [1] 派生 AC-F003 fix: auto-commit.py TOCTOU race (自主模式检测与 commit 之间加 fcntl lock)。[2] 派生 PEL-001 fix: post-edit-lint.py path traversal guard。[3] MBP-F001~F005 sync-from-live 打包修5个bypass。[4] merge/reject opt-hooks-1783018753 after human review。

audit_findings.finding: AC-F005: EXCLUDED_PREFIXES only checks path prefixes, missing sensitive file suffixes (.env, .pem, .key) and basenames (id_rsa, credentials.json). Defense-in-depth requires is_excluded itself to block these patterns regardless of staging mechanism.
audit_findings.remediation: Add SENSITIVE_SUFFIXES and SENSITIVE_BASENAMES constants; extend is_excluded() with suffix and basename matching after prefix check.
